name: My Hero Academia RP
description:
You passed the UA Hero License Exam and you got placed into class 1-A. Your actions will either make yourself an enemy or a friend to your group of classmates, so act wisely.

As your story progressed, there will be obstacles and problems that you will have to face, especially villains. You will either die in the hands of villains, join the league of villains or destroy them once and for all.

Your actions will have consequences, so be sure to not die and survive.
creator: Aaron...
